title: Phlegmariurus tafaensis
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus tafaensis is classified as a species of plant in the family Lycopodiaceae, commonly known as club mosses or lycopods. It belongs to the genus Phlegmariurus, which is a group of fern allies. This classification places Phlegmariurus tafaensis within the division Lycopodiophyta, a group of plants that are vascular but lack true leaves. The plant is also classified as an epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants for support. Further classification includes its kingdom, Plantae, and its phylum, Lycopodiophyta.
